title: getModel() throws 'No model found' with a confusing message when no env keys are set
body: providers.ts's getModel() only checks customModel, deepSeekR1Model, and o3MiniModel; if none of OPENAI_KEY, FIREWORKS_KEY, or CUSTOM_MODEL are set it just throws new Error('No model found') with no mention of which env vars to configure. Took me a while to realize I hadn't set OPENAI_KEY.

title: FIRECRAWL_CONCURRENCY env override is not validated
body: deep-research.ts reads ConcurrencyLimit via Number(process.env.FIRECRAWL_CONCURRENCY) || 2, but if someone sets FIRECRAWL_CONCURRENCY to a non-numeric string like 'high', Number() returns NaN, the || 2 fallback kicks in silently -- fine there -- but setting it to '0' also falls back to 2 because 0 is falsy, which is surprising if you intentionally want to disable concurrency for debugging.

title: processSerpResult's 60s abort timeout is too short for deepseek-r1 reasoning model
body: processSerpResult in deep-research.ts hardcodes abortSignal: AbortSignal.timeout(60_000) on the generateObject call. When getModel() resolves to deepSeekR1Model (via wrapLanguageModel with extractReasoningMiddleware), the reasoning tokens alone can take longer than 60s for a big SERP result, causing aborted research runs. Should this be configurable per model?

title: trimPrompt's character-per-token estimate can recurse forever on non-English content
body: trimPrompt in providers.ts assumes ~3 characters per token to compute chunkSize, then recursively calls itself if still too long. For CJK text encoded with o200k_base, the actual chars-per-token ratio is much lower than 3, so the recursive trimPrompt(prompt.slice(0, chunkSize), contextSize) can take many iterations before converging, and there's no recursion depth guard.

title: Document how to add a new SERP query language/prompt strategy
body: systemPrompt() in prompt.ts sets the tone and constraints for generateSerpQueries but there's no doc explaining how someone could swap in a different research prompt strategy (e.g. finance-specific research) without editing prompt.ts directly.
